title: erodium iranicum
intro: Erodium iranicum is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, commonly known as the Iranian storksbill or Persian stork's bill. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and improving immune function. Erodium iranicum is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts can also be found in various supplements and formulations.
